lyrics_lrc:
[00:00.10]Stingray, Stingray, Stingray Cay!
[00:11.80]We're going to camp today, hey, hey!
[00:16.02]Sandy toes and salty hair,
[00:18.00]Sea Stars meeting everywhere!
[00:20.06]Stingray, Stingray, Stingray Cay!
[00:24.82]Hooray, hooray, hooray!
[00:28.04]Stingray, Stingray, Stingray Cay!
[00:31.82]We're going to camp today!
